name: Pixtral Large (124B)
license: Mistral Research License (non-commercial; commercial license required for production)
archDisplay: Dense decoder (123B, built on Mistral Large 2) + vision encoder (1B)
note: 124B multimodal model built on Large 2; strong chart/document/math-vision reasoning; led LMSys vision leaderboard among open-weights models at launch.
tpsNote: 124B model exceeds a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM even at Q4; requires multi-GPU or CPU offload.

results.notes: MMMU (CoT) row of the card's benchmark comparison table.
ChartQA (CoT) row of the same table.
DocVQA (ANLS) row of the same table.
VQAv2 (VQA Match) row of the same table.
AI2D (BBox) row of the same table.

verificationNotes: Real release confirmed via mistral.ai/news/pixtral-large/ (fetched): released 2024-11-18, 124B total (123B decoder built on Mistral Large 2 + 1B vision encoder) confirmed, Mistral Research License confirmed, 128k context confirmed ('fits minimum of 30 high-resolution images'). Sole benchmark row confirmed literally on the page: MathVista 69.4%. No corrections needed.
